lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰ ਗਤਿ ਗਭੀਰੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਪਰਚਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: agam agochar gat gabheer satigur parachaayau |
lines.english: Through the True Guru, You have realized the state of the Inaccessible, Unfathomable, Profound Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਮਾਣਿਅਉ ਲਾਖ ਮਹਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhai nirbhau maaniaau laakh meh alakh lakhaayau |
lines.english: In the Fear of God, You enjoy the Fearless Lord; among the thousands of beings, You see the Unseen Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਚੈ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਰਾਜ ਮਹਿ ਜੋਗੁ ਕਮਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur parachai paravaan raaj meh jog kamaayau |
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, You are certified and approved; You practice Yoga in the midst of wealth and power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨਿ ਧੰਨਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਧੰਨਿ ਅਭਰ ਸਰ ਸੁਭਰ ਭਰਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan gur dhan abhar sar subhar bharaayau |
lines.english: Blessed, blessed, blessed is the Guru, who has filled to overflowing the pools which were empty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਗਮ ਪ੍ਰਮਾਣਿ ਅਜਰੁ ਜਰਿਓ ਸਰਿ ਸੰਤੋਖ ਸਮਾਇਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur gam pramaan ajar jario sar santokh samaaeiyau |
lines.english: Reaching up to the certified Guru, You endure the unendurable; You are immersed in the pool of contentment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਅਰਜੁਨ ਕਲੵੁਚਰੈ ਤੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਜੋਗੁ ਨਿਜੁ ਪਾਇਯਉ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: gur arajun kalayucharai tai sehaj jog nij paaeiyau |8|
lines.english: So speaks KALL: O Guru Arjun, You have intuitively attained the state of Yoga within Yourself. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਿਉ ਰਸਨਾ ਬਦਨਿ ਬਰ ਦਾਤਿ ਅਲਖ ਅਪਾਰ ਗੁਰ ਸੂਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਨਿਵਾਰੵਉ ॥
lines.translit: amiau rasanaa badan bar daat alakh apaar gur soor sabad haumai nivaaryau |
lines.english: Nectar drips from Your tongue, and Your mouth gives Blessings, O Incomprehensible and Infinite Spiritual Hero. O Guru, the Word of Your Shabad eradicates egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚਾ ਹਰੁਨਿ ਦਲਿਅਉ ਸੁੰਨ ਸਹਜਿ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਸਹਾਰੵਉ ॥
lines.translit: panchaa harun daliaau sun sehaj nij ghar sahaaryau |
lines.english: You have overpowered the five enticers, and established with intuitive ease the Absolute Lord within Your own being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਾਗਿ ਜਗ ਉਧਰੵਉ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਬਸਾਇਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: har naam laag jag udharyau satigur ridai basaaeaau |
lines.english: Attached to the Lord's Name, the world is saved; enshrine the True Guru within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਅਰਜੁਨ ਕਲੵੁਚਰੈ ਤੈ ਜਨਕਹ ਕਲਸੁ ਦੀਪਾਇਅਉ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: gur arajun kalayucharai tai janakah kalas deepaaeaau |9|
lines.english: So speaks KALL: O Guru Arjun, You have illliminated the highest pinnacle of wisdom. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਅਰਜੁਨੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਪ੍ਰਮਾਣੁ ਪਾਰਥਉ ਚਾਲੈ ਨਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur arajun purakh pramaan paarthau chaalai nahee |
lines.english: : Guru Arjun is the certified Primal Person; like Arjuna, He never leaves the field of battle.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠੇ ॥
lines.translit: soratthe |
lines.english: Sorat'h

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੇਜਾ ਨਾਮ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਵਾਰਿਅਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: nejaa naam neesaan satigur sabad savaariaau |1|
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is His spear and insignia. He is embellished with the Shabad, the Word of the True Guru. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਵਜਲੁ ਸਾਇਰੁ ਸੇਤੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰੀ ਕਾ ਬੋਹਿਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhavajal saaeir set naam haree kaa bohithaa |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is the Boat, the Bridge to cross over the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਅ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੰ ਹੇਤੁ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਾਗਿ ਜਗੁ ਉਧਰੵਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tua satigur san het naam laag jag udharyau |2|
lines.english: You are in love with the True Guru; attached to the Naam, You have saved the world. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਤ ਉਧਾਰਣੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੁਠੈ ਪਾਇਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: jagat udhaaran naam satigur tutthai paaeaau |
lines.english: The Naam is the Saving Grace of the world; by the Pleasure of the True Guru, it is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਨਾਹਿ ਅਵਰ ਸਰਿ ਕਾਮੁ ਬਾਰੰਤਰਿ ਪੂਰੀ ਪੜੀ ॥੩॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: ab naeh avar sar kaam baarantar pooree parree |3|12|
lines.english: Now, I am not concerned with anything else; at Your Door, I am fulfilled. ||3||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤਿ ਰੂਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਕਹਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: jot roop har aap guroo naanak kahaayau |
lines.english: The Embodiment of Light, the Lord Himself is called Guru Nanak.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਤੇ ਅੰਗਦੁ ਭਯਉ ਤਤ ਸਿਉ ਤਤੁ ਮਿਲਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: taa te angad bhyau tat siau tat milaayau |
lines.english: From Him, came Guru Angad; His essence was absorbed into the essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਗਦਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਿ ਅਮਰੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਥਿਰੁ ਕੀਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: angad kirapaa dhaar amar satigur thir keeo |
lines.english: Guru Angad showed His Mercy, and established Amar Daas as the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਰਦਾਸਿ ਅਮਰਤੁ ਛਤ੍ਰੁ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਹਿ ਦੀਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: amaradaas amarat chhatru gur raameh deeo |
lines.english: Guru Amar Daas blessed Guru Raam Daas with the umbrella of immortality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪਰਸਿ ਕਹਿ ਮਥੁਰਾ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਯਣ ॥
lines.translit: gur raamadaas darasan paras keh mathuraa amrit bayan |
lines.english: So speaks Mat'huraa: gazing upon the Blessed Vision, the Darshan of Guru Raam Daas, His speech became as sweet as nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਰਤਿ ਪੰਚ ਪ੍ਰਮਾਣ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਅਰਜੁਨੁ ਪਿਖਹੁ ਨਯਣ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: moorat panch pramaan purakh gur arajun pikhahu nayan |1|
lines.english: With your eyes, see the certified Primal Person, Guru Arjun, the Fifth Manifestation of the Guru. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਪੁਰਖਿ ਪਰਤਖਿ ਲਿਖੵਉ ਅਛਰੁ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਧੁਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: aad purakh paratakh likhyau achhar masatak dhur |
lines.english: From the very beginning, the Primal Being has written this destiny upon His forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿ ਰੂਪੁ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਧਰਿਓ ਉਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sat roop sat naam sat santokh dhario ur |
lines.english: He is the Embodiment of Truth; He has enshrined the True Name, Sat Naam, Truth and contentment within His heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਜੋਤਿ ਜਗਮਗੈ ਤੇਜੁ ਭੂਅ ਮੰਡਲਿ ਛਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: pragatt jot jagamagai tej bhooa manddal chhaayau |
lines.english: His Divine Light shines forth, dazzling and radiant; His Glorious Grandeur pervades the realms of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਨਿ ਮਥੁਰਾ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਸਦਾ ਥਿਰੁ ਲਾਇ ਚਿਤੁ ਸਨਮੁਖ ਰਹਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhan mathuraa moorat sadaa thir laae chit sanamukh rahahu |
lines.english: So speaks Mat'huraa: I constantly focus my consciousness on Him; as sunmukh, I look to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਸੁ ਪਰਸਿ ਪਰਸੁ ਪਰਸਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਕਹਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: paaras paras paras paras gur guroo kahaayau |
lines.english: Meeting the Guru, touching the Philosopher's Stone, He was acclaimed as Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਜੁਗਿ ਜਹਾਜੁ ਅਰਜੁਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਸਗਲ ਸ੍ਰਿਸ੍ਟਿ ਲਗਿ ਬਿਤਰਹੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kalajug jahaaj arajun guroo sagal srisatt lag bitarahu |2|
lines.english: In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, Guru Arjun is the Boat; attached to him, the entire universe is safely carried across. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਹ ਜਨ ਜਾਚਹੁ ਜਗਤ੍ਰ ਪਰ ਜਾਨੀਅਤੁ ਬਾਸੁਰ ਰਯਨਿ ਬਾਸੁ ਜਾ ਕੋ ਹਿਤੁ ਨਾਮ ਸਿਉ ॥
lines.translit: tih jan jaachahu jagatr par jaaneeat baasur rayan baas jaa ko hit naam siau |
lines.english: I beg from that humble being who is known all over the world, who lives in, and loves the Name, night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਮ ਅਤੀਤੁ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰੰਗੵੌ ਬਾਸਨਾ ਤੇ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਪੈ ਦੇਖੀਅਤੁ ਧਾਮ ਸਿਉ ॥
lines.translit: param ateet paramesur kai rang rangayau baasanaa te baahar pai dekheeat dhaam siau |
lines.english: He is supremely unattached, and imbued with the Love of the Transcendent Lord; he is free of desire, but he lives as a family man.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਰ ਪਰੰਪਰ ਪੁਰਖ ਸਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੇਮੁ ਲਾਗੵੌ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਗਵੰਤ ਰਸੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਅਉਰੈ ਕਾਮ ਸਿਉ ॥
lines.translit: apar paranpar purakh siau prem laagayau bin bhagavant ras naahee aaurai kaam siau |
lines.english: He is dedicated to the Love of the Infinite, Limitless Primal Lord God; he has no concerns for any other pleasure, except for the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਥੁਰਾ ਕੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸ੍ਰਬ ਮਯ ਅਰਜੁਨ ਗੁਰੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਕੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਪਾਇ ਰਹਿਓ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਸਿਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mathuraa ko prabh srab may arajun gur bhagat kai het paae rahio mil raam siau |3|
lines.english: Guru Arjun is the All-pervading Lord God of Mat'huraa. Devoted to His Worship, he remains attached to the Lord's Feet. ||3||
